pdg_node.statement: (target_log_prob_fn: callable(position) -> log_prob and/or gradient, initial_positions: vector or tensor, step_size: float, n_leapfrog: int, seed: int) -> tuple[StateModelSpec{position, logp_current, gradient, step_size, n_leapfrog, mass_matrix}, RNG state or jax.random.PRNGKey, pure log-probability/gradient evaluator]
pdg_node.informal_desc: Construct immutable HMC sampler state and initialize explicit RNG/PRNGKey state.

declaration.name: initializesamplerandrngstate
declaration.type_signature: (target_log_prob_fn: callable(position) -> log_prob and/or gradient, initial_positions: vector or tensor, step_size: float, n_leapfrog: int, seed: int) -> tuple[StateModelSpec{position, logp_current, gradient, step_size, n_leapfrog, mass_matrix}, RNG state or jax.random.PRNGKey, pure log-probability/gradient evaluator]
declaration.docstring: Construct immutable HMC sampler state and initialize explicit RNG/PRNGKey state.
declaration.conceptual_summary: Immutable Stochastic State Bootstrap. Creates an initial immutable state for a gradient-informed stochastic transition system from a numeric starting tensor and fixed hyperparameters. It evaluates a pure scalar-field oracle (and optional derivative) at the initial tensor to cache local energy and slope information, then packages these with integration controls and metric structure into a state record. In parallel, it deterministically maps an integer seed to an explicit pseudorandom state token that must be threaded through future transitions.. Applications: Initializing stochastic trajectory proposals in robot motion planning over continuous configuration spaces, Bootstrapping gradient-based random exploration of molecular conformation landscapes in computational chemistry, Seeding uncertainty-aware parameter-space exploration for geophysical inverse models, Starting constrained stochastic search in high-dimensional engineering design optimization

declaration.name: initializesamplerandrngstate

declaration.docstring: Construct immutable HMC sampler state and initialize explicit RNG/PRNGKey state.

pdg_node.statement: (initial_position: Tensor<B, 2>, initial_momenta: Tensor<B, 2>, initial_grad_summands: Tensor<B, 2>, step_size: T, n_leapfrog: usize, log_prob_oracle: callable(position) -> {log_prob: Tensor<B,1>, gradient: Tensor<B,2>}) -> tuple[Tensor<B, 2>, Tensor<B, 2>, Tensor<B, 2>]
pdg_node.informal_desc: Run the leapfrog recurrence for `n_leapfrog` steps using kick-drift-kick updates: AD-enable position, apply half-step momentum update from cached gradient summands, drift position by full step, evaluate log-probability gradient at new position, apply second half-step momentum update, and carry forward the new gradient summands.
